question: How many people were injured when Air Europa Flight UX045 experienced turbulence in July 2024?
ground_truth: Thirty of the 325 passengers and crew on board were injured.
event_desc: 1 July  Air Europa Flight UX045 makes an emergency landing at Natal Airport after encountering severe turbulence near the Brazilian coast on its way from Madrid to Montevideo. Thirty of the aircraft's 325 passengers and crew are injured.
